role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and vegetation as requested.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Eucalyptus) and agricultural patterns.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole design, image quality) to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Thailand. The agents provided strong, image-grounded evidence regarding the specific utility pole design and vegetation, which the meta-agent and tournament judge used effectively to disambiguate between the two strongest candidates (Thailand and Cambodia).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain, sandy soil, and eucalyptus match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified eucalyptus and fallow fields.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the yellow dashed center line and white edge lines.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the square-profile concrete pole and wiring.
